title: Xanthosia huegelii

It is native to Australia and is commonly known as the yellow buttons or button flower. The plant is a small shrubby perennial with white or yellow flowers and is often used in floral arrangements. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms associated with colds and flu, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
